entries.title: LMFDB contribution-policy re-verify (verdict-209 §1 Q-209-6 RE-VERIFY-AT-FIRE-TIME-RECOMMENDED, medium-risk)
entries.resolution: LMFDB is pre-contact-required (editorial board structure + Development.md introduce-yourself directive + no public contribute/policy/source page). D-1d (LMFDB triangulation of Q(j(tau)) class data) classification flipped from FOUNDATIONAL/PERMITTED (provisional) to DISTRIBUTION/BLOCKED. Same binding as verdict-209 Q-209-1 Aux row.
